role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United Kingdom. The agents provided consistent, image-grounded evidence (fencing, brick architecture, temperate deciduous trees) that converged on the correct answer. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the UK over other European candidates based on the specific combination of visual markers.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of leafless trees, green pastures, and wooden fences match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of dormant broadleaf trees and hedgerows is visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Observations of the narrow road and fence style are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the brick house and window style are consistent with the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the United Kingdom.
